features.name: Martial Arts
features.safe_summary: Use Dexterity for unarmed/monk-weapon attacks, scale unarmed damage with your Martial Arts die, and unlock bonus-action unarmed follow-ups.
features.rules_summary: Use Dexterity for unarmed/monk-weapon attacks, scale unarmed damage with your Martial Arts die, and unlock bonus-action unarmed follow-ups.

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.safe_summary: Your Armor Class comes from your body and stats instead of needing armor.
features.rules_summary: Your Armor Class comes from your body and stats instead of needing armor.

features.name: Weapon Mastery (2 weapons)
features.safe_summary: You unlock weapon rider properties that make attacks do more than just deal damage.
features.rules_summary: You unlock weapon rider properties that make attacks do more than just deal damage.

features.name: Flurry of Blows

grants_actions.name: Flurry of Blows
grants_actions.summary: Spend focus to convert momentum into extra strikes.

features.safe_summary: Spend focus to convert momentum into extra strikes.
features.rules_summary: Spend focus to convert momentum into extra strikes.

features.name: Patient Defense

grants_actions.name: Patient Defense
grants_actions.summary: Spend focus to become much harder to pin down or hit cleanly.

features.safe_summary: Spend focus to become much harder to pin down or hit cleanly.
features.rules_summary: Spend focus to become much harder to pin down or hit cleanly.

features.name: Step of the Wind

grants_actions.name: Step of the Wind
grants_actions.summary: Spend focus to move like a problem the battlefield cannot easily hold.

features.safe_summary: Spend focus to move like a problem the battlefield cannot easily hold.
features.rules_summary: Spend focus to move like a problem the battlefield cannot easily hold.

features.name: Monastic Tradition (Subclass)
features.safe_summary: Choose your tradition and unlock a stronger identity for the rest of the build.
features.rules_summary: Choose your tradition and unlock a stronger identity for the rest of the build.

features.name: Deflect Attacks
features.trigger: When a visible creature hits you with an attack roll.

grants_actions.name: Deflect Attacks
grants_actions.summary: Use your reaction to blunt or redirect incoming punishment.

features.safe_summary: Use your reaction to blunt or redirect incoming punishment.
features.rules_summary: Use your reaction to blunt or redirect incoming punishment.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.safe_summary: Improve key ability scores or take a feat to reshape the build.
features.rules_summary: Improve key ability scores or take a feat to reshape the build.

features.name: Slow Fall

grants_actions.name: Slow Fall
grants_actions.summary: Reduce fall damage and turn dangerous height into a manageable problem.

features.safe_summary: Reduce fall damage and turn dangerous height into a manageable problem.
features.rules_summary: Reduce fall damage and turn dangerous height into a manageable problem.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.safe_summary: When you take the Attack action, you can now make up to 2 attacks within that action.
features.rules_summary: When you take the Attack action, you can now make up to 2 attacks within that action.

features.name: Stunning Strike
features.trigger: Immediately after you hit with a melee attack.

grants_actions.name: Stunning Strike
grants_actions.summary: Spend focus on a hit to threaten one of the strongest control riders in the class.

features.safe_summary: Spend focus on a hit to threaten one of the strongest control riders in the class.
features.rules_summary: Spend focus on a hit to threaten one of the strongest control riders in the class.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.safe_summary: This level opens or advances your subclass path, adding themed powers unique to your chosen specialization.
features.rules_summary: This level opens or advances your subclass path, adding themed powers unique to your chosen specialization.

features.name: Empowered Strikes
features.safe_summary: Your strikes now count as a more reliable supernatural threat against resistant enemies.
features.rules_summary: Your strikes now count as a more reliable supernatural threat against resistant enemies.

features.name: Evasion
features.safe_summary: Dexterity-based area threats hurt you less when you react well.
features.rules_summary: Dexterity-based area threats hurt you less when you react well.

features.name: Stillness of Mind
features.safe_summary: You can shake off mental disruption and regain control over yourself.
features.rules_summary: You can shake off mental disruption and regain control over yourself.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.safe_summary: Improve key ability scores or take a feat to reshape the build.
features.rules_summary: Improve key ability scores or take a feat to reshape the build.

features.name: Acrobatic Movement
features.safe_summary: You move across the battlefield and vertical terrain with fewer normal limitations.
features.rules_summary: You move across the battlefield and vertical terrain with fewer normal limitations.

features.name: Heightened Focus
features.safe_summary: Your focus engine becomes more forgiving, making your best techniques easier to sustain through a long fight.
features.rules_summary: Your focus engine becomes more forgiving, making your best techniques easier to sustain through a long fight.

features.name: Self-Restoration
features.safe_summary: You can actively clear off problems that would normally keep other front-liners shut down.
features.rules_summary: You can actively clear off problems that would normally keep other front-liners shut down.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.safe_summary: This level opens or advances your subclass path, adding themed powers unique to your chosen specialization.
features.rules_summary: This level opens or advances your subclass path, adding themed powers unique to your chosen specialization.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.safe_summary: Improve key ability scores or take a feat to reshape the build.
features.rules_summary: Improve key ability scores or take a feat to reshape the build.

features.name: Deflect Energy
features.trigger: When you take Acid, Cold, Fire, Force, Lightning, or Thunder damage from a visible source.

grants_actions.name: Deflect Energy
grants_actions.summary: Use your reaction to blunt incoming elemental or force-based punishment the way you already answer weapon pressure.

features.safe_summary: Use your reaction to blunt incoming elemental or force-based punishment the way you already answer weapon pressure.
features.rules_summary: Use your reaction to blunt incoming elemental or force-based punishment the way you already answer weapon pressure.

features.name: Disciplined Survivor
features.safe_summary: Your body and mind become much harder to crack with failed saves or attrition.
features.rules_summary: Your body and mind become much harder to crack with failed saves or attrition.

features.name: Perfect Focus
features.safe_summary: Your focus resource becomes much easier to maintain at the exact point where high-tier encounters start trying to exhaust it.
features.rules_summary: Your focus resource becomes much easier to maintain at the exact point where high-tier encounters start trying to exhaust it.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.safe_summary: Improve key ability scores or take a feat to reshape the build.
features.rules_summary: Improve key ability scores or take a feat to reshape the build.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.safe_summary: This level opens or advances your subclass path, adding themed powers unique to your chosen specialization.
features.rules_summary: This level opens or advances your subclass path, adding themed powers unique to your chosen specialization.

features.name: Superior Defense
features.duration: Until the start of your next turn.

grants_actions.name: Superior Defense
grants_actions.summary: Your defensive tools upgrade into a premium survival mode for the nastiest fights on the table.

features.safe_summary: Your defensive tools upgrade into a premium survival mode for the nastiest fights on the table.
features.rules_summary: Your defensive tools upgrade into a premium survival mode for the nastiest fights on the table.

features.name: Body and Mind
features.safe_summary: Your discipline keeps both your body and your mind steady under pressure.
features.rules_summary: Your discipline keeps both your body and your mind steady under pressure.

features.name: Epic Boon
features.safe_summary: Gain an endgame reward that pushes the build into truly legendary territory.
features.rules_summary: Gain an endgame reward that pushes the build into truly legendary territory.

features.name: Monk's Focus (Focus Points)
features.recovery: Regain all expended Focus Points when you finish a Short or Long Rest.
features.safe_summary: Your focus pool fuels the monk’s best mobility, defense, and burst techniques.
features.rules_summary: Your focus pool fuels the monk’s best mobility, defense, and burst techniques.

features.name: Perfect Discipline
features.trigger: At initiative, if you have fewer than 4 Focus Points.
features.safe_summary: When initiative starts and you are low on Focus, you regain enough Focus to re-enter your class loop immediately.
features.rules_summary: When initiative starts and you are low on Focus, you regain enough Focus to re-enter your class loop immediately.

features.name: Discipline Points
features.safe_summary: Discipline Points is tracked as a Monk feature. Needs table-specific rules text if your source differs.
features.rules_summary: Needs DM content
